hero.tagline: Together with love, we invite you to celebrate our wedding

events.title: Sangeet, Mehndi Ceremony
events.description: The sacred ceremony marking the formal acceptance of the groom.

events.title: Mangal Snan, Baraat Prasthan, Vivah Sanskar
events.description: The grand wedding day with baraat procession and sacred vivah sanskar.

events.title: Var Vadhu Gruh Pravesh
events.description: The auspicious grah pravesh to bless the couple.

blessings.name: Family
blessings.message: May your love grow stronger with each passing day. You are a blessing to all of us. Wishing you a lifetime of happiness together. 🙏

blessings.name: Parents
blessings.message: Our hearts are full of joy seeing you begin this beautiful journey. May God bless you both with eternal love and prosperity. 🌸

blessings.name: Friends
blessings.message: Two amazing souls coming together! May your marriage be filled with laughter, adventures, and endless love. 💕

blessings.name: Elders
blessings.message: May your journey together be filled with love, respect, and prosperity. May you build a home full of warmth, laughter, and lifelong happiness. 🪷

invitation.hindi: Dil se nivedan hai ki aap apni upasthiti se is shubh avsar ko aur bhi khaas banayein.
invitation.english: With love, we invite you to celebrate this beautiful union.

quotes.text: A successful marriage requires falling in love many times, always with the same person.
quotes.author: Mignon McLaughlin

quotes.text: In all the world, there is no heart for me like yours. In all the world, there is no love for you like mine.
quotes.author: Maya Angelou

quotes.text: Love is not about how many days, months, or years you've been together. It's about how much you love each other every day.
quotes.author: Unknown

quotes.text: The best thing to hold onto in life is each other.
quotes.author: Audrey Hepburn

footer.address: Nikat Manoj Provision Store, Main Road Ghandhi Nagar, Muzaffarnagar, UP
